div.h2: Output Formatting Pipeline: Raw Registers → strace-style Line

p.em: data_walk — single syscall transformation (orig_rax=2, rdi=0x7ffd3400, rsi=0x0, rax=3)

g.text: orig_rax | unsigned long long | 2 // syscall nr (preserved)
rax | unsigned long long | 3 // return value
rdi | unsigned long long | 0x7ffd3400 // arg1: char* path
rsi | unsigned long long | 0x0 // arg2: int flags
rdx | unsigned long long | 0x0 // arg3: mode_t (unused)
retval >= 0 | success path | print as decimal
Error range: [-4095, -1] — avoids mmap MAP_FAILED=-1 collision
outbuf[512] — built across entry + exit stops (handle_syscall_stop)
fputs() | single write() call → atomic line | no interleaving
SIZE | 49 bytes (< PIPE_BUF=4096, guaranteed atomic on write)
NOTE | printed at EXIT stop only — entry half buffered in outbuf
g_filter.count | 0 → no filter set | PASS (show all)
strcmp("open", names[i]) | if filter active | checked per name
no match → outbuf_len = 0 | discard buffered entry | suppress print
timing+stats ALWAYS recorded regardless of filter result
errno=0 before each call | -1 ambiguity guard
